message:
shared,web: Move system message filtering to ingest time

- Add command message type for slash commands (/clear, /compact, etc.)
- Parse <command-name> and <local-command-stdout> into unified command messages
- Strip <system-reminder> tags from user messages at ingest
- Strip ANSI escape codes from command output
- Strip bash/zsh -lc shell wrappers from Bash tool commands
- Add command message rendering in web UI with Terminal icon
- Simplify display-time filtering (most now handled at ingest)

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/042a821e-8f2b-4fdf-939c-bdf6b7cb8f8e
